reasoning: The question asks if Casey DeSantis announced her candidacy for Florida governor before July 1, 2025. Numerous highly authoritative and recent sources from mid-2025 to early 2026 confirm that she has not entered the race. An August 2025 Politico report noted she "has not made any firm moves toward a candidacy." A February 2026 Politico article titled "The Casey DeSantis question looming over Florida's governor race" reported that insiders expect she won't run at all and confirmed that she and the governor haven't floated her name to insiders or started fundraising. Polls in July 2025 also characterized her potential run as "hypothetical" and noted that she had yet to declare your candidacy. Consequently, it is virtually certain she did not announce a gubernatorial run before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
